revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: undo wikidata additions from past 2 hours
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6138226)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove [[en:...]] and [[sn:...]] interwiki links
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CHE here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#invoke:flag||Switzerland}}<noinclude> {{flag template documentation|Switzerland|CHE|SUI|SUI}}
</noinclude>
